query:
SELECT 
  id, name, "isAvailable", "workerLatitude", "workerLongitude", 
  "workerLocation" IS NOT NULL AS has_geometry,
  "workerSearchMode", "workerCity", "workerRegion"
FROM users 
WHERE "isAvailable" = true
ORDER BY "updatedAt" DESC
LIMIT 10;
